'''ngamaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidaria|cnidaria]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidaria|cnidaria]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngamaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæmæyæth|ngæmæyæth]] || [[word:ngæmæyæj|ngæmæyæj]] || [[word:ngæmæyæsh|ngæmæyæsh]] || [[word:ngæmæyæ|ngæmæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamamayath|ngamamayath]] || [[word:ngamamayaj|ngamamayaj]] || [[word:ngamamayash|ngamamayash]] || [[word:ngamamaya|ngamamaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamayath|ngamayath]] || [[word:ngamayaj|ngamayaj]] || [[word:ngamayash|ngamayash]] || [[word:ngamaya|ngamaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamafyath|ngamafyath]] || [[word:ngamafyaj|ngamafyaj]] || [[word:ngamafyash|ngamafyash]] || [[word:ngamafyaf|ngamafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngamayatha|ngamayatha]] || [[word:ngamayaja|ngamayaja]] || [[word:ngamayasha|ngamayasha]] || [[word:ngamayaka|ngamayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngamayath|ngamayath]] || [[word:ngamayaj|ngamayaj]] || [[word:ngamayash|ngamayash]] || [[word:ngamaya|ngamaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngamayathal|ngamayathal]] || [[word:ngamayajal|ngamayajal]] || [[word:ngamayashal|ngamayashal]] || [[word:ngamayakal|ngamayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngamayathatha|ngamayathatha]] || [[word:ngamayajaja|ngamayajaja]] || [[word:ngamayashasha|ngamayashasha]] || [[word:ngamayaka|ngamayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngamayathan|ngamayathan]] || [[word:ngamayajan|ngamayajan]] || [[word:ngamayashan|ngamayashan]] || [[word:ngamayakan|ngamayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngamayathaoro|ngamayathaoro]] || [[word:ngamayajaoro|ngamayajaoro]] || [[word:ngamayashaoro|ngamayashaoro]] || [[word:ngamayakaoro|ngamayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
